description_long: This vending machine features a modern, rectangular design with a predominantly dark exterior and a large, illuminated display panel at the top right, which shows an image of ice cubes. The front face includes a vertical section with a keypad and a digital display for user interaction, as well as a series of transparent or semi-transparent product slots below. The left side of the front is a smooth, light-colored panel with a subtle wave pattern, likely for aesthetic appeal. The sides and back of the machine are solid and unadorned, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The overall construction suggests a robust, metal frame with glass or plastic panels for product visibility and user interface.
description: A modern, dark-colored vending machine with an illuminated display, keypad, and visible product slots on the front. The design is sleek with a mix of metal and glass or plastic surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated display panel, keypad, product slots, and decorative side panel.
description_view_1: Rear view, entirely solid and featureless, emphasizing the machine's boxy structure.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the stepped profile and the depth of the machine, with no visible interactive features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also featureless and solid, showing the machine's width.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular, illuminated display panel is located at the top right of the front face, showing an image of ice cubes.
attribute_payment_interface: A small digital payment interface is present above the keypad, likely supporting card or contactless payments.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical keypad with multiple round buttons is located below the payment interface on the front panel.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A horizontal product retrieval slot is located below the keypad and product selection area, with a transparent or semi-transparent cover.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The illuminated display panel at the top right features an image of ice cubes, but no explicit branding, logos, or text are visible.
